text.title: tmux-power-user Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for tmux-power-user as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Sending commands to tmux panes as a substitute for proper systemd service management.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: tmux panes are ephemeral user-space processes. Commands sent via send-keys do not survive server reboots. Use systemd user services for persistent processes and tmux only for interactive monitoring.
